description: Third-party contractors utilized to monitor core digital assets utilize standing, unmonitored external VPN tunnels to push adjustments.
mitigation_strategy: Transition the infrastructure to an explicit, zero-standing-privilege framework. Enforce time-bounded, centrally revocable remote access sessions backed by mandatory MFA. Deploy Internal Network Security Monitoring (INSM) to log and analyze all vendor sessions in real time.
risk_owner: Director of Infrastructure Security / Lead Compliance Analyst

description: Industrial control endpoints do not report authentication telemetry or system alert events to the central security team.
mitigation_strategy: Implement unidirectional data gateways (data diodes) to securely pass system event logs outward from the OT environment to a centralized, air-gapped Splunk SIEM cluster without permitting data back-feed channels.
